notes: DOCUMENTED TARGET — not yet recorded. driver_gap (gap:permission-approval): opencode's auto-classifier lives in the interactive TUI, but the recording rig drives opencode through headless `opencode run`, which auto-executes tools with no observable classification or waiting state (PROVEN by auto-executed-tool-call, which captured gemma's write tool running inside the working span with zero waiting/approval state). The driver (drive-opencode-interactive.sh) handles only send|wait_turn|sleep — no approve/deny/classify step — so this safe-path cell is unrecordable until a live-REPL (tmux TUI) opencode driver can elicit the auto-classifier. This spec asserts the SAFE (auto-approved) arc the unblocked recording would capture: a benign tool call the in-product classifier approves WITHOUT prompting, so the session traces ready→working→ready and state never entered waiting. The risky (prompt-fires) arc is the sibling tool-gate-permission-prompt cell. Session state lives in opencode's SQLite store (~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db), observed by the daemon's ProcessOwnedStore source as a UUID-keyed ses_… session; the turn settles working→ready when the parser sees a step-finish part with reason="stop" (parser.go parseStepFinish). session_birth is anchored to recording start and left UNPINNED so a transient proc-<PID> presession cannot steal identity and cascade same_session_as failures; turn1_start (matching working) establishes the session identity that the later phases chain off. The no_waiting_window invariant pins the safe-path 'State never entered waiting' bullet across the whole turn.

text: The ses_… session appears in ready within 2s of opencode launch; never enters waiting
PID bound to the ses_… session
User prompt drives the ses_… session ready → working (spec safe-path bullet)

The auto-classifier approves the benign tool call without prompting → no permission gate → the working span sustains and state must never enter waiting (spec safe-path bullet: 'State never entered waiting')
The turn completes back to ready on the same ses_… session when step-finish reason=stop closes the turn; the safe-path arc is ready→working→ready end-to-end with no detour through waiting
